header.description: Invoice metadata, company details, and customer billing/shipping information.

rows.description: Line items for the invoice including item code, description, quantity, rate, and total amount.

totals.description: Aggregated financial totals for the invoice.

semantics: Scalars represent single values per invoice. Row tokens represent multiple rows per invoice. Totals are pre-aggregated in the source `invoices` table.
transformations: Join invoices and invoice_items on invoice_number.
Format invoice_date and due_date to dd-mm-yyyy HH:MM:SS.
Apply currency formatting to all monetary fields.
Filter invoices by date range if provided.
